name: neo
description: Multi-agent semantic reasoning system with persistent memory for code suggestions, architectural guidance, and optimization recommendations

interface.longDescription: Neo is a mode-explicit reasoning helper. Codex skills use read-only `advise` by default and `learn` only for deliberate pattern evidence. `agent` requires explicit workspace authority plus a host executor; Neo never executes generated shell commands. Requires the neo CLI installed locally (`pip install neo-reasoner[openai]`).
